## Capability grants

Declared principal grant-sets (0011 §4.4, 0012 §5.1), attenuated per `mesh`.
Read-only principals cannot acquire write/publish grants they were not given:

### mesh `session`

| Principal | Role | Capabilities |
|-----------|------|--------------|
| `operator` | `control-plane` | `fs.repo_rw`, `process.spawn`, `mcp.github_write`, `mcp.github_read`, `mem.admin`, `network.egress` |
| `collector` | `collect` | `fs.repo_ro`, `mcp.github_read`, `mem.recall` |
| `verifier` | `verify` | `fs.repo_ro`, `mcp.github_read`, `mem.recall` |
| `coderLang` | `implement` | `fs.repo_rw`, `process.spawn_sandboxed`, `mem.recall` |
| `coderRuntime` | `implement` | `fs.repo_rw`, `process.spawn_sandboxed`, `mem.recall` |
| `reviewer` | `review` | `fs.repo_ro`, `mem.recall` |
| `documentarian` | `reflect` | `fs.repo_rw`, `mem.append` |
| `integrator` | `integrate` | `fs.repo_ro`, `mcp.github_write`, `network.egress` |

The implied daemon-channel uses follow from the stream sources:

| Principal / consumer | Used channel | Implied membrane |
|----------------------|--------------|------------------|
| `stream transcripts` | `agentpipe.transcripts` | `media` capture |
| `stream ebpfEvents` | `agentGuardd.ringbuf` | `ebpf` (agent-guardd) |
| `fiber transcriptMiner` (`output = artifacts.palaceEntries`) | artifact capture | `filesystem` (fs-snapshotd) |

> Membranes per [`docs/context/PROJECT_CONTEXT.md`](../../../../docs/context/PROJECT_CONTEXT.md)
> and the daemon roster in [`docs/runtime/README.md`](../../../../docs/runtime/README.md).
> eBPF policy manifests / OTel config / systemd units / surface launcher are
> deferred targets (0012 §7).
